creator: goksin@goksinakdeniz.net
text:
When I tried to install Apache openoffice.org 4.0.0 via ports, install process stopped with the following error message. distinfo file says the size of AppcheOpenOffice.ext_sources.4.0.0.r1503704does not match the fetched one which is ~63 MB. 

Error log of port build:

To build OOo, you should have a lot
of free diskspace (~ 11GB) and memory (~ 2GB).
If you want SDK and/or solver, please type make sdk and/or make solver
=> apache-openoffice-4.0.0-r1503704-src.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/openoffice.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.riken.jp/net/apache/openoffice/4.0.0/source/apache-openoffice-4.0.0-r1503704-src.tar.bz2
apache-openoffice-4.0.0-r1503704-src.tar.bz2  100% of  202 MB  152 kBps 00m00s
=> ApacheOpenOffice.ext_sources.4.0.0.r1503704.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/openoffice.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.cn.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/maho/openoffice/ApacheOpenOffice.ext_sources.4.0.0.r1503704.tar.bz2
fetch: ftp://ftp.cn.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/maho/openoffice/ApacheOpenOffice.ext_sources.4.0.0.r1503704.tar.bz2: size mismatch: expected 138567395, actual 68602339
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/openoffice/ApacheOpenOffice.ext_sources.4.0.0.r1503704.tar.bz2
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/openoffice/ApacheOpenOffice.ext_sources.4.0.0.r1503704.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/openoffice and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4.
*** [package] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4.

How-To-Repeat: Run the follwing commands 

No1: "# portinstall -vp editors/openoffice-4" 

or 

No2: "# cd /usr/ports/editors/openoofice-4 && make install"
